гҖҖгҖҖA Silicon Valley private eye, Clyde Cooper, is hired by a tech investor to find a missing woman, the love of his life, who had mysteriously disappeared. Following dubious leads, Cooper runs into an odd ring of pretty women and shady characters until he finds much more than what he's looking for.
introduction: A Silicon Valley private eye, Clyde Cooper, is hired by a tech investor to find a missing woman, the love of his life, who had mysteriously disappeared.
